headline: Stocks Mixed as Crude Oil Prices and Bond Yields Fall

headline: Ryanair Group CEO Michael O’Leary on jet fuel crisis: Expect airline bankruptcies in Europe
summary: Ryanair Group CEO Michael O’Leary, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company's quarterly earnings results, impact of rising jet fuel costs, Europe's energy policies, state of travel demand, and more.

headline: Americans Have Spent $41 Billion Extra On Gas Since Iran War Began As Inflation Pressures Spread Across Economy
summary: Americans have spent over $41 billion on fuel since the Iran war began as gas prices and inflation pressures continue rising.

headline: Warren Buffett Famously Bailed On Airlines in 2020. Now Berkshire Just Bet $2.65 Billion on Delta. Time to Buy?
summary: A six-year exile from the airline sector just ended with one of the conglomerate's biggest new positions in years.
